---
title: "gtscales DOCX Example"
format:
  docx: default
---

```{r}
devtools::load_all(".")
library(gt)
library(scales)
```

This example shows the DOCX workflow for `gtscales`.

`gtscale_postprocess_docx()` is available as a fallback repair helper, but the
goal is for this example to work without it.

```{r}
gt::exibble |>
  gt() |>
  gtscale_data_color_continuous(
    column = num,
    palette = c("#A0442C", "white", "#0063B1"),
    labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()),
    width = "220px",
    title = "Numeric scale"
  )
```

```{r}
data.frame(
  district = c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
  status = c("Safe D", "Toss-up", "Lean R", "Safe R"),
  margin = c(18, 2, -6, -21)
) |>
  gt() |>
  gtscale_data_color_discrete(
    column = status,
    values = c("#2166AC", "#F7F7F7", "#F4A3B4", "#B2182B"),
    labels = c("Safe D", "Toss-up", "Lean R", "Safe R"),
    title = "Race rating"
  )
```
